message:
Revert "feat: Extract @pymode/wasi and @pymode/asyncify as npm packages"

This reverts commit 701b7056898260e1ed572e80a7b195f3d86e7a62.

files.patch:
@@ -3,16 +3,12 @@
   "version": "0.1.0",
   "description": "Python compiled to WebAssembly using Zig, targeting Cloudflare Workers",
   "private": true,
-  "workspaces": [
-    "packages/*"
-  ],
   "scripts": {
     "build:phase1": "./scripts/build-phase1.sh",
     "build:phase2": "./scripts/build-phase2.sh",
     "test": "vitest run",
-    "test:packages": "npm --workspaces test",
     "test:pydantic": "vitest run --config vitest-pydantic.config.ts",
-    "test:all": "vitest run && npm --workspaces test && vitest run --config vitest-pydantic.config.ts",
+    "test:all": "vitest run && vitest run --config vitest-pydantic.config.ts",
     "test:watch": "vitest",
     "test:legacy": "python3 scripts/test.py",
     "dev": "wrangler dev",

@@ -1,15 +0,0 @@
-{
-  "compilerOptions": {
-    "target": "ES2022",
-    "module": "ES2022",
-    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
-    "lib": ["ES2022"],
-    "strict": true,
-    "noEmit": true,
-    "skipLibCheck": true,
-    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
-    "isolatedModules": true,
-    "verbatimModuleSyntax": true
-  },
-  "include": ["src/**/*.ts", "test/**/*.ts"]
-}
